headline: Freedom Broker Raises Target on Bank of America (BAC) After Strong Q1 Results
summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) ranks among the best stocks for a couch potato portfolio. On April 23, Freedom Broker boosted Bank of America’s (NYSE:BAC) price target to $65 from $61, maintaining a Buy rating on the company’s shares. The firm emphasized the bank’s solid first-quarter 2026 performance, which beat market forecasts in earnings per […]

headline: Record Setting $57.3 Million Raised for Nonprofits at the 2026 Boston Marathon presented by Bank of America
summary: The Boston Athletic Association (B.A.A.) announced today the total funds raised through the 2026 Boston Marathon presented by Bank of America reached a record $57.3 million, surpassing last year's single-year record of $50.4 million. The growth represents a 13.7% increase in fundraising year over year.

content.title: Record Setting $57.3 Million Raised for Nonprofits at the 2026 Boston Marathon presented by Bank of America
content.summary: The Boston Athletic Association (B.A.A.) announced today the total funds raised through the 2026 Boston Marathon presented by Bank of America reached a record $57.3 million, surpassing last year's single-year record of $50.4 million. The growth represents a 13.7% increase in fundraising year over year.

headline: How The DexCom (DXCM) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Guidance And Valuation Resets
summary: DexCom’s latest valuation work now centers on a fair value anchor of US$81.64, slightly below the prior US$83.54 level and closer to the current range of Street targets. Many firms have trimmed price targets after recent Analyst/Investor Day updates, reflecting a balance between confidence in execution and a more cautious stance on longer term growth and valuation assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets, together with fresh guidance and product news, shape the...
